name: VaultSpark Football GM
currentFocus: Session 21 shipped infrastructure hardening for the Studio protocol layer: hidden child-process execution by construction, CANON-044 Wave enforcement, task-board/blocker truth repair, and honest SIL/context telemetry.
nextMilestone: Commit and push Session 21 to main, let GitHub Pages deploy from the direct push, then apply or unlock the Cloudflare custom-domain runbook and verify the public URL.
blockers: vaultsparkstudios.com serves a Cloudflare 403 and its GitHub Pages cert is expired (bad_authz) — Cloudflare-side fix required; runbook in TASK_BOARD

testSuiteStatus.coverage: Known default-shard inventory is 161 tests (core 54, runtime 79, sim-contract 22, sim-realism 1, studio 5). Session 21 reran the full default suite plus Pages build and Pages smoke.

highlights: Priority Inbox (CRITICAL/IMPORTANT/FLAVOR tiers, bell badge, slide-in drawer)
Live Sim-Watch overlay (300ms animated drive log, key play cards)
Franchise Moment card (cinematic post-game drama + share button)
GM Decision modal (pre-advance choices on critical weeks)
Cap War Room (4-year visual cap timeline, color-coded risk zones)
Trade Breakdown card (A-F letter grades, fairness verdict)
Season Narrative Arcs (3 dynamic story threads per season)
GM Persona progress bar + confetti tier-up burst
SimJob TTL cleanup (10-min eviction, prevents OOM)
5 new API endpoints (season-arcs, gm-decision, records/franchise, team-archetypes, franchise-moment)
Mobile 375px overflow fixes across all new modals

freeTierAuditNote: Verified S138 #753: pure browser game, no LLM/email/per-user backend calls. Static deploy.
